comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
Please see the attached screenshot. Looking at it again, it seems like self-promotion. I will move to annoyance.
Screenshot
Also, I will narrow the rule to select the first child. ```adblock temu.com###mainHeader > div > div > div:first-of-type[role="region"] ```

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/213083#issuecomment-4432283548
こちらで再現しません。コンテンツブロッカーのバグが疑われますので、一度、Safariの設定（iOSの設定アプリ→Safari）からコンテンツブロッカーをすべて無効化してから再度有効化し、Safariを再起動してください。次に、AdGuardアプリを開いて右上の回転する矢印を押しフィルタの更新をし、１分以上このウィンドウを開いたままにしておいてください。

issue.title: Add luhxebag.com to scam/malware filter - counterfeit brand + non-delivery fraud
issue.body:
## Domain to block

`luhxebag.com`

## Category

Scam / Counterfeit site / Non-delivery fraud

## Evidence

**luhxebag.com** is a counterfeit storefront impersonating the registered LUHXE brand ([luhxe.com](https://luhxe.com)), owned by The PocketPharma Store LLC (USPTO Trademark Registration #7656203).

The site:
- Sells counterfeit LUHXE-branded luxury bags at below-market prices
- Accepts payment via Square (credit/debit card)
- Does not deliver any goods (non-delivery fraud / wire fraud)
- Was registered 2025-07-04 (recently created, typical pattern for fraud sites)

## Technical profile

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Domain | luhxebag.com |
| Registrar | Spaceship Inc. |
| Created | 2025-07-04 |
| DNS | Cloudflare (gloria.ns.cloudflare.com) |
| CMS | WordPress + WooCommerce |
| Payment | Square |
| Google Analytics | G-PB0191NEBH |

## Legal context

- 15 USC §1114 (Lanham Act - trademark counterfeiting)
- 18 USC §1343 (Wire fraud - non-delivery scheme)
- USPTO Trademark Reg #7656203 (LUHXE mark)

## Reporter

Shrey Bakhai, operations partner for Luhxe Inc. / The PocketPharma Store LLC
Contact: shrey@grrbaow.com

## Requested action

Add `luhxebag.com` to AdGuard scam/malware filter to protect users from being defrauded.

issue.title: luhxebag.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
## Domain to block

`luhxebag.com`

## Category

Scam / Counterfeit site / Non-delivery fraud

## Evidence

**luhxebag.com** is a counterfeit storefront impersonating the registered LUHXE brand ([luhxe.com](https://luhxe.com)), owned by The PocketPharma Store LLC (USPTO Trademark Registration #7656203).

The site:
- Sells counterfeit LUHXE-branded luxury bags at below-market prices
- Accepts payment via Square (credit/debit card)
- Does not deliver any goods (non-delivery fraud / wire fraud)
- Was registered 2025-07-04 (recently created, typical pattern for fraud sites)

## Technical profile

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Domain | luhxebag.com |
| Registrar | Spaceship Inc. |
| Created | 2025-07-04 |
| DNS | Cloudflare (gloria.ns.cloudflare.com) |
| CMS | WordPress + WooCommerce |
| Payment | Square |
| Google Analytics | G-PB0191NEBH |

## Legal context

- 15 USC §1114 (Lanham Act - trademark counterfeiting)
- 18 USC §1343 (Wire fraud - non-delivery scheme)
- USPTO Trademark Reg #7656203 (LUHXE mark)

## Reporter

Shrey Bakhai, operations partner for Luhxe Inc. / The PocketPharma Store LLC
Contact: shrey@grrbaow.com

## Requested action

Add `luhxebag.com` to AdGuard scam/malware filter to protect users from being defrauded.

comment.body:
@zloyden This rule: `attackofthefanboy.com,destructoid.com,edmontonsun.com,gamepur.com,gamerjournalist.com,gameskinny.com,nj.com,primagames.com,siliconera.com,syracuse.com,themarysue.com,touchtapplay.com,wegotthiscovered.com#%#//scriptlet('ubo-aost', 'decodeURI', '/(?=^(?!.*\.js))/')` seems to be what fixes it. 

I tried excluding the rule to see what would happen and it started showing admiral again. I tested the rule on the other sites, and it seems to fix the issue for all of them.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).
